title: Freddy Fazbear | Warden Replacement
description: Replaces the Warden with Freddy Fazbear (Requires Optifine or Entity Model and Texture Features)
body:
![Freddy screaming at the camera](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ba846a2decd2290849913fb6da5f7c27665fdfe.jpeg)

### _"Are you ready for Freddy?"_

This Resource Pack replaces the Warden with the one, the only, Freddy Fazbear! Included in this replacement is a custom model, sounds ripped directly from the game, and two alternate skins obtained by renaming the Warden. 

Much inspiration came from [Lantos](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/lanto/) take on the concept in their own [Freddy Warden Replacement](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/freddy-fazbear-warden-replacement-1-19-w-sounds/) (Go check it out, it's pretty good!) and all sound effects used come from the very first FNaF game made by, of course, Scott Cawthon.

## Requirements
The pack uses a CEM (Custom Entity Model) to change out the warden, so either Optifine or the EMF and ETF mods are required for it to do more than replace the sounds.
